full_text:
Xue Ze
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Ze. Ambushed Deng Zhi on Xiahou Mao’s orders but was killed by Zhang Bao. Xue Ze is a fictional character. Xue Ze was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
